items: Nathan Eovaldi blanked Toronto for 7.0 innings, striking out 9 in Texas's 5-4 win.
Tristan Peters had 6 RBI, with 1 home run as Chicago White Sox beat Kansas City, 22-1.
Miguel Vargas had 5 RBI, with 1 home run as Chicago White Sox beat Kansas City, 22-1.
Miami pitching combined to shut out St. Louis, 4-0.
Detroit pitching combined to shut out Houston, 8-0.
